message.content:
@startuml
title Get Park Reviews Activity

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #666666
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  ActorBorderColor #666666
  ActorBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  DatabaseBorderColor #666666
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  BoxBorderColor #666666
  BoxBackgroundColor #EAF7F7
}

box "Front End" #FFF9D6
  actor Client as Client
end box

box "Back End" #EAF7F7
  participant "Website Park Page" as Web
  participant "GetParkReviewsActivity" as Act
  database "Reviews" as Reviews
end box

Client -> Web : Visit park page
activate Web

Web -> Act : Send get reviews request
activate Act

Act -> Reviews : Get reviews
activate Reviews
Reviews --> Act : Reviews item
deactivate Reviews

Act --> Web : ReviewsModel
deactivate Act

Web --> Client : Present reviews
deactivate Web

@enduml
